description: Freebox curated calisthenics skill progression library. Each family progresses from level 1 (easiest) to level 6 (advanced). Saturday focus is to level up through these paths.

levels.name: Australian pull-up
levels.description: Horizontal row using a low bar. Keep the body perfectly straight from heels to head.

levels.name: Jackknife pull-up
levels.description: Vertical pull with heels supported on a bench in front of you to reduce active bodyweight.

levels.name: Negative pull-up
levels.description: Jump to the top position (chin over bar) and perform a controlled eccentric descent lasting exactly 5 seconds.

levels.name: Chin-up
levels.description: Strict vertical pull with an underhand grip (palms facing you). Full dead-hang at the bottom.

levels.name: Strict pull-up
levels.description: Strict vertical pull with an overhand grip (palms facing away), zero body kipping allowed.

levels.name: Weighted pull-up
levels.description: Strict vertical pull using external load (weight belt or dumbbell between feet).
levels.target: 3 sets of 6 strict reps with +10% bodyweight

levels.name: Bench dip
levels.description: Arm support behind body on a bench, feet on floor. Keep hips close to the bench.

levels.name: Feet-elevated bench dip
levels.name_pt: Mergulho no banco com pés elevados
levels.description: Tricep dip with hands on one bench and heels elevated on another bench in front.

levels.name: Jumping dip with slow negative
levels.description: Jump to the top of parallel bars and lower your body slowly for 5 seconds per rep.

levels.name: Strict bar dip
levels.description: Strict parallel bar dip. Lower until shoulders pass below the elbow crease.

levels.name: Ring dip
levels.description: Strict dip performed on suspended gymnastics rings. Requires active shoulder stabilization.

levels.name: Weighted bar dip
levels.description: Strict parallel bar dip using external load attached to the waist.
levels.target: 3 sets of 6 strict reps with +15% bodyweight

levels.name: Pike hold on floor
levels.description: Inverted V position with feet and hands on floor, pushing active shoulders away from ground.

levels.name: Pike hold with feet elevated
levels.description: Hands on floor, feet on box. Walk hands close to box to stack hips directly over shoulders.

levels.name: Wall walk to handstand
levels.description: Start in push-up position with feet against wall. Walk feet up and hands toward the wall.
levels.target: 3 sets of 30 seconds hold near the wall

levels.name: Kick-up to handstand against wall
levels.description: Face wall and kick legs up to enter handstand, resting heels lightly on wall.

levels.name: Handstand push-up against wall
levels.description: Vertical handstand push-up against wall. Head touches floor lightly at bottom before pressing up.

levels.name: Freestanding handstand
levels.description: Balance in handstand without wall or external support. Stabilize using finger pressure.

levels.name: Assisted squat
levels.description: Deep bilateral squat holding straps or poles in front for balance and weight relief.

levels.name: Step-down
levels.description: Stand on a 20cm box. Lower one heel to touch the ground slowly under control, then drive back up.

levels.name: Counterbalanced pistol squat
levels.description: Single-leg squat extending free leg forward, holding a 3-5kg weight with straight arms as counterbalance.

levels.name: Strict pistol squat on box
levels.description: Perform a pistol squat standing on a bench or box. Let the free leg hang down off the side to reduce flexibility demand.

levels.name: Strict pistol squat
levels.description: Deep single-leg squat on flat ground. Free leg must remain parallel to floor without touching.

levels.name: Weighted pistol squat
levels.description: Deep single-leg squat holding a heavy dumbbell or kettlebell close to the chest.

levels.name: Tuck hanging leg raise
levels.description: Hanging from a bar, pull knees up to chest slowly under control without swinging.

levels.name: Strict hanging leg raise
levels.description: Hanging from a bar, lift straight legs until parallel to floor. Control descent.

levels.name: Tuck L-sit on parallettes/bench
levels.description: On parallettes or bench, depress shoulders actively and hold hips off support with knees tucked to chest.

levels.name: Single-leg L-sit on floor
levels.description: Seated on floor, hands next to hips. Push floor away to lift hips and one straight leg, keeping other knee bent.

levels.name: Strict L-sit on parallettes
levels.description: On parallettes, support body weight with active shoulders and hold straight legs at a 90-degree angle.

levels.name: Strict L-sit on floor
levels.description: Seated on floor with straight legs, hands next to thighs. Press ground to lift entire body and straight legs to 90 degrees.

levels.name: Active scapular pull
levels.description: Hanging straight-armed from bar, depress scapulae to pull chest up without bending elbows.

levels.name: Tuck front lever hold
levels.description: Hang from bar, pull yourself upside down and hold torso completely horizontal with knees tucked tightly to chest.

levels.name: Advanced tuck front lever
levels.description: Same as tuck front lever, but open knee angle slightly and extend hips, keeping back completely flat.

levels.name: Single-leg front lever
levels.description: Hold body horizontal on bar with one leg straight in line with torso and the other tucked to chest.
levels.target: 3 sets of 10 seconds hold per leg

levels.name: Straddle front lever
levels.description: Hold body horizontal on bar with straight legs spread wide to reduce leverage difficulty.

levels.name: Full front lever
levels.description: Hold body completely straight and horizontal suspended under the bar with straight arms pulling active lats.

levels.name: Strict chest-to-bar pull-up
levels.description: Strict vertical pull bringing lower chest (sternum) to touch the bar.

levels.name: Strict high pull-up
levels.description: Vertical pull with maximum concentric velocity, pulling bar to lower ribs or navel level.

levels.name: Russian dip
levels.description: On parallel bars, drop down to rest forearms on bars, lean forward, and press back up to high dip position.

levels.name: Assisted bar muscle-up
levels.description: Transition over the bar with assistance band under feet to reduce velocity requirement.

levels.name: Strict bar muscle-up
levels.description: Continuous ascent over bar with zero kipping or leg swing, strictly transitioning from pull to press.

levels.name: Strict ring muscle-up
levels.description: Complete muscle-up transition on suspended gymnastics rings starting from strict false grip.
